appraisal_events.evidence: Mes grands-parents opposaient une fin de non-recevoir absolue aux prières les plus faciles à satisfaire... obligés, chaque fois que Swann leur en reparlait, de faire semblant de ne plus voir [la jeune fille].
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann’s request for an introduction is flatly refused and even met with pretense, a clear local act of social exclusion from a valued access.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally excluded from desired social access (the introduction), despite the request being easy to grant.
